name: api-call
description: Make curl API calls with JSON or form body, headers, cookie support, API key, and HTML pattern extraction, replacing repetitive curl chains and web scraping steps.

parameters.name: --method
parameters.description: HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE; default: GET)

parameters.name: --data
parameters.description: JSON body data (or pipe via stdin)

parameters.name: --form-data
parameters.description: Form field in KEY=VALUE format for URL-encoded POST (repeatable, auto-sets Content-Type)

parameters.name: --cookie-jar
parameters.description: Save response cookies to FILE (like curl -c)

parameters.name: --extract
parameters.description: Extract first match of grep -oP PATTERN from response body

parameters.name: --extract-all
parameters.description: Extract all matches of grep -oP PATTERN from response body

parameters.name: --status
parameters.description: Show HTTP status code in output

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses curl -s -X POST -H Content-Type -d JSON -w status into one step, saving 1-2 agent steps per API call; --form-data collapses form-based login (CSRF extraction + curl -d) into one step; --cookie-jar/--cookie collapses cookie-based scraping chains; --output saves curl -o redirect; --extract collapses curl+grep -oP into one step.
